assertions.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for the root cause
assertions.evidence: H1: stale closure, H2: interval stacking, H3: StrictMode in table. All three distinct hypotheses enumerated.

assertions.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
assertions.evidence: Proposes functional updater experiment to test whether setCount((c) => c + 1) vs setCount(count + 1) resolves the issue.

assertions.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
assertions.evidence: Confirms H1 (stale closure) by analyzing closure capture in render cycles and dependency tracking.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies stale closure over the count variable as the root cause
assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies stale closure as the root cause with proper explanation of closure capture.

assertions.text: Proposes using the functional updater form as the fix
assertions.evidence: Proposes the correct fix: setCount((c) => c + 1) functional updater pattern.
